aleabit.layer_label: Layer 3 — 半导体模拟测试机
aleabit.verdict_label: 模拟测试机国产化龙头
aleabit.thesis: Domestic leader in analog/mixed-signal semiconductor test handlers. 国产替代 Teradyne/Advantest 路径清晰,模拟测试机本身是 fab/封测 chokepoint。PB 14.39 已经把国产替代溢价打了不少,市值 602亿过线,but business is a real chokepoint.

signals.name: 供应链汇聚
signals.note: 国内长电/通富/华天/SMIC 都是客户

signals.name: 分析师覆盖率 < 3
signals.note: 国内 coverage 非常充分,西方 also tracks given Teradyne comparison

signals.name: 技术深度门槛
signals.note: ATE 测试机是高门槛工程

signals.name: 政府/国防关联
signals.note: Big Fund + 国家半导体战略

signals.name: CEO 二级市场买入
signals.note: 民营创始人但无近期显著增持

aleabit.ai_relevance: Indirect — AI 芯片需要 mixed-signal/RF test,国产 test 设备受益于 fab 扩产
